# Mikey Sleighthand

> San Diego magician specializing in refined close-up magic and live event entertainment.

Mikey Sleighthand performs polished sleight of hand and intimate magic experiences for corporate events and weddings in San Diego. Investment: $5,000 per event (up to 2 hours).

## Website Scope

This website is a single landing page focused on booking inquiries.

## Page

- [Home](https://www.mikeysmithmagic.com/): Hero, service highlights, and booking contact form.

## Contact

Use the booking form on the homepage to request availability and event details.

## Location

San Diego, California, United States
